pages.text: Part of $(creatures/death)Death$(/l)'s accoutrements, the Hand of Death grants the user $(item)Chill Touch$() when they strike a creature with the hand. $(item)Chill Touch$() causes damage equal to 15% of the targets maximum health and ignores Armor.

If the Hand of Death is used while the player is wearing $(l:artifacts/clothing/death_clothing#hood)Death's Hood$(/l), $(l:artifacts/clothing/death_clothing#robe)Death's Robe$(/l) and $(l:artifacts/clothing/death_clothing#footwear)Death's Footwear$(/l), $(l:artifacts/weapons)Death's Scythe$(/l) will be summoned. Using the Hand of Death a second time will dismiss the Scythe.$(br)Every second that Death's Scythe is held, a point of $(item)Hunger$() will be lost.
